name: multi-agent-niuma
description: 桌面牧场 — 多 Agent 状态拟人化看板

scripts.realtime:truth-check: node scripts/check-agent-host-discovery.mjs && node scripts/check-agent-host-actions.mjs && node scripts/check-agent-instance-projection.mjs && node scripts/check-agent-session-projection.mjs && node scripts/check-realtime-truth-renderer.mjs
scripts.build: vite build && esbuild electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --outfile=dist-electron/main.cjs && esbuild electron/preload.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --packages=external --outfile=dist-electron/preload.cjs
scripts.package:win: npm run build && powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-win-unpacked.ps1
